specializations: Natural conditioning agents and hair care lipids

product_highlights: Crodamol™ esters — premium emolliency and conditioning for hair care
Incroquat™ conditioning agents — outstanding detangling and softness
Specialty hair care lipids for fiber repair and shine enhancement
100% bio-based ingredients target by 2030 — leading sustainability roadmap
notes: Croda International is a global specialty chemical company with a strong commitment to sustainability and natural ingredients. Their Crodamol™ ester range provides excellent emolliency and conditioning for hair care applications, while their Incroquat™ conditioning agents deliver outstanding detangling and softness. Croda's sustainability credentials are among the strongest in the industry, with a target of 100% bio-based ingredients by 2030.
